channel.title: Errant Thinking - RPG Blog Carnival
channel.description: Asking insightful questions. Seeking thoughtful answers.

item.title: Tiny Epics: Small Souls in a Big World!
item.author: Errant Thinking
item.description: The small ones among us are sometimes overlooked, but they surely have grand tales to tell! This March, let's explore these tiny epics for the RPG Blog Carnival. This is a community event, so we'll ponder some ideas for this theme, then get to creating and start some discussion! Share your creations with me early and I'll do weekend updates along with a final roundup on March 31st.
